chunks.text: Order sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett.D-788 of 2021 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 29.09.2025 Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General along with Taj Muhammad, Town Officer Kotdiji/respondent No.5 ************** In response to the BWs, the Town Officer Kotdiji/respondent No.5 appeared and submitted that the grievance of the petitioner has already been redressed. However, despite issuance of notice of intimation to the petitioner and his counsel, none appeared nor any intimation received. Similar was the position on the last dates of hearing, i.e., 02.09.2025 and 16.09.2025. From the conduct of the petitioner and his counsel, it appears that they have lost interest in pursuing the present Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
